creator: onyx@homenet-kaluga.ru
text:
The port does not build
 It seems in Makefile in line 426:
 
 =========================================
 cd $(srcdir) && rm -f configure
 =========================================
 
 `make` stops with
 
 ==========================================
 cd . && perl admin/am_edit -padmin Makefile.in
 cd . && rm -f configure
 cd . && gmake -f admin/Makefile.common configure
 gmake[1]: Entering directory  
 `/usr/ports/deskutils/kicker-compiz/work/kicker-compiz-3.5.4'
 Can't open configure: No such file or directory.
 gmake[1]: Leaving directory  
 `/usr/ports/deskutils/kicker-compiz/work/kicker-compiz-3.5.4'
 /bin/sh ./config.status --recheck
 running CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh /bin/sh ./configure  --without-java  
 --build=i386-portbld-freebsd6.2 --x-libraries=/usr/local/lib  
 --x-includes=/usr/local/include --disable-as-needed  
 --with-qt-includes=/usr/local/include --with-qt-libraries=/usr/local/lib  
 --with-extra-libs=/usr/local/lib --with-extra-includes=/usr/local/include  
 --prefix=/usr/local --mandir=/usr/local/man --infodir=/usr/local/info/  
 build_alias=i386-portbld-freebsd6.2 CC=cc CFLAGS=-O2 -fno-strict-aliasing  
 -pipe  CPPFLAGS=  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include   
 -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H CXX=c++ CXXFLAGS=-O2 -fno-strict-aliasing  
 -pipe  --no-create --no-recursion
 ./configure: Can't open ./configure: No such file or directory
 gmake: *** [config.status] ïÛÉÂËÁ 2
 *** Error code 2
 
 Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/kicker-compiz.
 ==========================================
 
 Please correct it.
